body.title: Granny: exact-match dispatch mode for agent testing
body.result: exact_match flag in granny.yaml + match_rule returns None + run_once defers with warning; 9 tests
body.intention: I intend that exact-match mode prevents any cross-tier dispatch so individual agent tiers can be tested in isolation.
body.description:
Add `exact_match: true` top-level flag to granny.yaml (default: false). When true, the role rules only match exact role values — no cascade, no default fallback to CC. Tickets with no matching device are deferred (log warning, no action).

**Affected files:** devices/granny/daemon.py, config/granny.yaml
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — exact_match flag, modified match_rule/run_once. OUT — cascade logic (T-granny-tier-cascade).
**Completion criteria:** With `exact_match: true`, a master-role ticket does not route to DickSimnel; an apprentice-role ticket with no matching device is skipped with a log warning rather than defaulting to CC.0. Test: unit test.
